posters.title: Explain UX vs UI Design
posters.description: Prepare a comprehensive answer detailing the difference between User Experience (UX) and User Interface (UI) design, how they collaborate, and who handles research vs aesthetics.
posters.author: Easy

posters.title: Nielsen's Heuristic Evaluations
posters.description: Understand and list Jacob Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics for user interface design. Be prepared to provide real-world website examples for at least 3 heuristics.
posters.author: Intermediate

posters.title: User Research Methodologies
posters.description: Explain when to use quantitative methods (e.g. surveys, analytics) versus qualitative methods (e.g. user interviews, usability testing) in product lifecycles.
posters.author: Intermediate

posters.title: The Double Diamond Process
posters.description: Walk through the four stages of the Design Council's Double Diamond model: Discover, Define, Develop, and Deliver. Clarify divergence and convergence phases.
posters.author: Advanced

posters.title: Mobile Design Accessibility
posters.description: Outline key considerations for mobile accessibility including WCAG color contrast thresholds, minimal interactive tap target size (e.g. 48x48dp), and screen reader support.
posters.author: Advanced
